picks.reasoning: Celta Vigo are in red-hot form after eliminating Lyon 2-0 (3-1 on agg) in the Europa League this week. The market has been slow to reprice them for that momentum and quality. Alavés are a lower-half La Liga side with no comparable run of form. Ladbrokes' 1.91 implies just 52.4% — a significant underestimate of a team playing with European confidence at home.

Stuttgart were knocked out of the Europa League 4-1 on aggregate by Porto, a humbling exit that will weigh on morale. Yet Ladbrokes still price them as heavy favourites at 2.05 — a line that reflects league position more than current form. Augsburg at home are organised, hard to beat, and motivated. At 3.25, there is clear value on the upset.

picks.match: FC St. Pauli vs SC Freiburg
picks.reasoning: St. Pauli are a freshly promoted side scrapping for survival. Freiburg are a well-drilled, experienced Bundesliga outfit who consistently outperform expectations away from home. The 35.7% implied probability for Freiburg is too low against a side with limited top-flight quality. Expect Freiburg's superior squad depth to tell.
